meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (base)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0xa07355aFd674C53f801cF84EE51d46231dc6b2ED on base. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
